texto: Which is better: to dare to look directly into the blinding present, no matter how painful, or to await the detachment of hindsight -- which, being less painful, is more objective?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Thomas Buergenthal que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Which is better: to dare to look directly into the blinding present, no matter how painful, or to…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, reflection, which, com foco em reflexao.
